ItacPersonItem.Notes: Alfonso Valentino was the son of Oddo Ludovico, belonged to the nobility, and was a famous jurist. He was five times prince of the Accademia Delia. He joined the Ricovrati in 1684 and was prince of the Academy in 1687-88.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
